ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISS JACQUELINE SAMARA REILLY COLLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZABALA ANIDIA $483.95 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $521.95, JUDG.ENTERED ON 3/4/93 IN SUP.CT.SCA 22301. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
